title: hieracium dilutius
intro: Hieracium dilutius, also known as the lesser hawk's-beard, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating wounds, skin issues, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Hieracium dilutius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium dilutius can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
